\begin{table*}[t]
  \caption{Component ablation of KAC across all three benchmarks. All variants are trained with five seeds (42, 123, 456, 789, 1337); we report mean\,$\pm$\,std on the held-out test split. Best mean per column per dataset is in \textbf{bold}. The contribution of each component is evaluated by toggling it relative to the previous row (V1$\to$V2 isolates the text branch; V2$\to$V3 isolates the KPI-level contrastive loss; V3$\to$V4 isolates the uncertainty-weighting term).}
  \label{tab:ablation}
